name: cambia-monorepo
description: Cambia — a DESIGN.md extension that makes a design system role-aware and (optionally) adaptive.

scripts.build: bun run --filter='@epode/cambia-core' build && bun run --filter='@epode/cambia-runtime' build && bun run --filter='@epode/cambia-react' build && bun run --filter='@epode/cambia' build
scripts.test: bun run --filter='@epode/cambia-core' test && bun run --filter='@epode/cambia-runtime' test
